name: batch-read
description: Read one or more files at once with file headers, supporting single or multiple line ranges, head/tail, offset+head (tail -n +N | head -M), line numbers/nl-mode, wc-like line counts, cd-to-dir, --try for auto-extension resolution, --grep for filtering content with context and invert, or all files in a directory via --dir with optional --name filter.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more file paths to read, or use --dir=DIR to read all files

parameters.name: --lines
parameters.description: Line range(s) to read: single (10-30) or comma-separated (1-200,200-350,350-450) to read multiple chunks from the same file in one step, collapsing nl -ba | sed -n chains

parameters.name: --offset
parameters.description: Start reading from line N (combine with --head for tail -n +N | head -M)

parameters.name: --nl
parameters.description: Alias for --number, matches nl -ba output format

parameters.name: --wc
parameters.description: Show line count for each file (replaces wc -l) instead of file content

parameters.name: --dir
parameters.description: Read all files recursively in this directory (auto-excludes node_modules, .git)

parameters.name: --name
parameters.description: File name glob filter when using --dir (e.g., *.ts; repeatable)

parameters.name: --try
parameters.description: Try common extensions (.js,.ts,.jsx,.tsx,.json,.py,.php,.css,.scss,.yml,.yaml,.md,.txt) if exact file not found

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Grep pattern to filter file content (replaces cat | grep chains)

parameters.name: --grep-context
parameters.description: Lines of context around each match (grep -C), overrides --grep-after/--grep-before

parameters.name: --grep-after
parameters.description: Lines of context after each match (grep -A)

parameters.name: --grep-before
parameters.description: Lines of context before each match (grep -B)

parameters.name: --grep-invert
parameters.description: Invert grep match (grep -v), show non-matching lines

parameters.name: --max-depth
parameters.description: Max directory depth when using --dir (default: unlimited)

parameters.name: --no-header
parameters.description: Suppress file header (===== filename =====) in output

examples.expected: Content of client/blocks/like-button/index.jsx with file header

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd, cat, sed, head, tail, find, sort, wc -l, and cat+grep chains into one step, saving N-1 agent steps per batch; multi-range --lines=1-200,200-350,350-450 collapses 3 nl -ba | sed -n calls into 1 step saving 2 agent steps; --dir --name collapses find+cat into one step; --try collapses cat ext || cat ext2 || find fallback chains; --grep collapses cat | grep -n -A/B into one step.
